task_completion.description: Log in to the GeoServer web admin interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser shows the GeoServer interface at localhost:8080 with the user logged in as 'admin' (e.g., admin menus are visible on the left, or a 'Logout' button is present).

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Workspaces section and open the form to add a new workspace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'New Workspace' form is visible in the main content area of the GeoServer interface, displaying input fields for 'Name' and 'Namespace URI'.
The text 'natural_earth' is typed into the 'Name' input field on the New Workspace form.
The text 'http://naturalearthdata.com' is typed into the 'Namespace URI' input field on the New Workspace form.

task_completion.description: Save the new workspace and verify it appears in the workspaces list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Workspaces list page is displayed, and 'natural_earth' is visible as an entry in the table of existing workspaces, indicating it was successfully saved.

integrity.description: The agent used the GeoServer web GUI to create the workspace.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser navigating the GeoServer interface, rather than terminal windows executing 'curl' commands or Python scripts using the REST API.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual GeoServer application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface shown is the authentic GeoServer web admin GUI (typically featuring a green header and a left-hand sidebar menu), not a mock HTML page or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the application by directly editing backend configuration files.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent using a terminal or text editor to manually create or modify GeoServer XML configuration files in the data directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected workspace name is exactly 'natural_earth'. The expected namespace URI is exactly 'http://naturalearthdata.com'.
